body_txt: This is for scenes usually presented as parts of a work involving the characters or some of the real-life people involved in the show (depending on the nature of the show) discussing something about the episode, such as its message, or what led to idea to make an episode about the subject they chose, etc... Often presented in the prologue or epilogue, and often in what looks like an otherwise quiet room, like a fancy living room or an office. In some cases the speaker will be portrayed as sitting down and/or reading before and/or after said episode discussion moment. Goes well with a Very Special Episode and/or And Knowing Is Half the Battle .
